updates.summary: This is a minor version update that adds two new features without removing or modifying existing functionality. updates.summary: This minor update adds support for null/undefined values in the value prop, improving TypeScript compatibility with Sanity TypeGen. The change is additive and backward compatible, only extending existing functionality without breaking current usage patterns.
ramifications: Improved TypeScript experience when using with Sanity TypeGen
More flexible prop handling for null/undefined values
Potential for cleaner code when dealing with optional portable text content

ramifications: Error objects may now include additional trace ID information from backend responses
